testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
14:14:24.408 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.omnicharge.operatorservice.OperatorServiceApplicationTests]: OperatorServiceApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:14:24.965 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.omnicharge.operatorservice.OperatorServiceApplication for test class com.omnicharge.operatorservice.OperatorServiceApplicationTests 14:14:25.415 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.omnicharge.operatorservice.OperatorServiceApplicationTests]: OperatorServiceApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:14:25.419 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.omnicharge.operatorservice.OperatorServiceApplication for test class com.omnicharge.operatorservice.OperatorServiceApplicationTests 14:14:26.855 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
